# Execution Model Checklist: 洗车执行模型重构

**Purpose**: 评估洗车执行模型重构规格在流程推进、异常路径、状态分离与结果判定方面的需求质量，确认其是否足以进入实施规划。  
**Created**: 2026-05-05  
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are all session lifecycle states explicitly defined beyond the minimum "开始/运行/完成/中止" set, including any intermediate states needed for planning? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK002 Are all single-execution lifecycle states and their entry/exit conditions documented, not just listed at a high level? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK003 Are the required attributes for "当前执行进度" fully specified so reviewers can tell whether progress is stage-based, step-based, or both? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK004 Are the required fields of a state transition record sufficiently defined for all audit-critical scenarios, including rejected start requests and ignored late events? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK005 Does the spec define what constitutes "其他业务事件" or at least bound the category tightly enough to prevent scope drift during planning? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK006 Are the requirements for program-data validity checks defined clearly enough to distinguish availability failure, content invalidity, and validation-rule failure? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001A]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK007 Is "当前有效的单次执行" defined with clear exclusivity rules so planners can distinguish active execution from historical execution records? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "保持当前状态不变" specified with enough precision to clarify whether timestamps, counters, or observability records may still change without being treated as a state transition? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK009 Is "继续当前会话" after a timeout result defined clearly enough to distinguish continuation of the same execution versus creation of a follow-up execution? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK010 Are the terms "完成", "停止", "中止", "故障", and "超时" distinguished with non-overlapping meanings so acceptance results cannot be interpreted in multiple ways? [Consistency, Spec §FR-018]
- [ ] CHK011 Is the phrase "固定本次任务使用的程序数据版本" precise enough to determine whether the snapshot is immutable by reference, by copy, or by version binding? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-016]
- [ ] CHK012 Are "拒绝原因" requirements specific enough to ensure different rejection causes are distinguishable during review and later task decomposition? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001A, Spec §FR-006B]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK013 Do the startup requirements align between the primary scenario, edge cases, and FR-001A so session creation is never implied before program-data validation passes? [Consistency, Spec §用户故事 1, Spec §边界场景, Spec §FR-001A]
- [ ] CHK014 Do the event-priority rules in Clarifications, edge cases, and FR-017A use the same canonical ordering without alternate interpretations? [Consistency, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §边界场景, Spec §FR-017A]
- [ ] CHK015 Do the "single session at a time" assumptions align with the repeated-start rejection requirements without leaving room for queued or deferred starts? [Consistency, Spec §假设, Spec §FR-006B]
- [ ] CHK016 Are timeout handling rules consistent between FR-010, FR-011, edge cases, and user story acceptance scenarios? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011, Spec §边界场景, Spec §用户故事 2]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK017 Are the measurable outcomes tied to explicit requirement scopes, so each success criterion can be traced back to one or more functional requirements? [Traceability, Spec §SC-001 to §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK018 Is "100% of wash tasks" scoped clearly enough to define the intended validation sample or scenario matrix for requirement review? [Clarity, Spec §SC-001 to §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK019 Can the "1 minute" observability criterion be objectively assessed from the requirements alone, or are additional visibility expectations missing? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK020 Are the validation methods complete enough to cover every newly clarified rule, including rejected startup due to invalid program data and repeated start requests? [Coverage, Spec §V-001 to §V-006]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK021 Are primary flow requirements complete for the full journey from accepted start event through final session result handoff? [Coverage, Spec §用户故事 1, Spec §FR-001 to §FR-018]
- [ ] CHK022 Are alternate flow requirements defined for the case where an execution ends but the session continues with a subsequent decision path? [Gap, Spec §FR-011, Spec §边界场景]
- [ ] CHK023 Are exception-flow requirements complete for all explicitly named triggers: stop, fault, timeout, invalid start data, duplicate start, late event, and duplicate event? [Coverage, Spec §FR-001A, Spec §FR-006B, Spec §FR-017, Spec §FR-017A]
- [ ] CHK024 Are recovery-path requirements intentionally excluded or sufficiently defined when a fault result allows continuation rather than session abort? [Gap, Spec §FR-012]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK025 Are requirements defined for events arriving exactly at the timeout boundary, where both timeout and device feedback may appear valid? [Edge Case, Gap, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-017A]
- [ ] CHK026 Are requirements clear for a stop event arriving after a fault has already won priority but before final result recording completes? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-017A, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK027 Does the spec define whether ignored late or duplicate events still require recording metadata, or only a rejection outcome? [Ambiguity, Spec §边界场景, Spec §FR-017]
- [ ] CHK028 Are boundary conditions defined for startup requests that arrive immediately after a session has ended but before all final records are persisted? [Gap, Spec §FR-006B, Spec §FR-015, Spec §FR-017]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK029 Are observability requirements sufficiently specified to support the stated goal of improved observability, beyond the single transition-record minimum? [Completeness, Spec §重构目标 4, Spec §FR-015, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK030 Are reliability expectations defined for loss, duplication, or reordering of external input events, or is that risk intentionally out of scope? [Gap, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-017, Spec §FR-017A]
- [ ] CHK031 Are any timing or responsiveness expectations for detecting timeout events documented clearly enough for planning, even if implementation technology is not yet chosen? [Gap, Spec §FR-010, Spec §SC-001]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK032 Are the assumptions about external event sources and program-data sources validated with requirement-level constraints rather than left as informal background notes only? [Assumption, Spec §假设, Spec §依赖与默认前提]
- [ ] CHK033 Do the documented dependencies explain what requirement behavior is expected when those dependencies are temporarily unavailable? [Gap, Spec §依赖与默认前提]
- [ ] CHK034 Is the assumption of "one complete task per session" reflected consistently in all user stories, entities, and functional requirements? [Consistency, Spec §假设, Spec §关键实体, Spec §FR-001]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK035 Is there any unresolved ambiguity between "结束当前执行" and "中止当前会话" that could lead planners to create overlapping transition rules? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-011, Spec §FR-012]
- [ ] CHK036 Are there any remaining vague terms such as "明确", "可判断", or "可验证" that need a more concrete requirement-level definition for planning use? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-018, Spec §SC-001 to §SC-005]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
